cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which present Eve ends up with after all the swaps. Let me start by listing each person and their initial gifts. Initially: - Alice has green - Bob has purple - Claire has blue - Dave has black - Eve has red Now, the swaps happen in a specific order. Let me track each swap step by step. First swap: Dave and Claire swap. So Dave, who had the black ball, now has Claire's blue present. Claire, who had blue, now has Dave's black ball. So after first swap: - Alice: green - Bob: purple - Claire: black - Dave: blue - Eve: red Second swap: Bob and Alice swap. Bob has purple, Alice has green. After swapping: - Alice: purple - Bob: green - Claire: black - Dave: blue - Eve: red Third swap: Eve and Bob swap. Eve has red, Bob has green. After swapping: - Alice: purple - Bob: red - Claire: black - Dave: blue - Eve: green Fourth swap: Bob and Dave swap. Bob has red, Dave has blue.
